_README: Copy this file to vault.local.json. The local file is ignored by git. Configure vaultCardsDir for saved cards/notes and aiClis for local model CLIs. Both can be left empty: cards will be written to _vault_out/ and AI can still use BYO-key.
_aiClis_README: Each preset defines a local CLI. cmd receives the prompt on stdin. Use {out} when the CLI should write the final answer to a temporary file, or {model} when the model name is part of the command. modelArg and effortArg append whitelisted UI selections with {v}. Remove presets you do not use.
